title: podman mount of running container can not be umounted.
body:
We should be able to mount and umount a running container once.  And only fail to umpount if the image was never mounted.


Create a container
```
# podman run -d fedora sleep 60000
f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
```
Mount the container.
```
# podman mount f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/3dacf07b65cd12e926615d192c484c42aad6baeb5bf3fae79130816e4994af5c/merged
```
Attempt to unmount the container, I believe this should work, since it should be decrementing the count of mounted containers.
```
# podman umount f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
error unmounting container f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c: cannot unmount storage for container f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c as it is running or paused: container state improper
```
Stop the running container
```
# podman stop f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
```
Now umount the container and it works.
```
# podman umount f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
```
Mount it again.
```
# podman mount f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/3dacf07b65cd12e926615d192c484c42aad6baeb5bf3fae79130816e4994af5c/merged
```
And Umount it again, which is successful since the container is not running.
```
# podman umount f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
```
Now mount it multiple times.
```
# podman mount f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/3dacf07b65cd12e926615d192c484c42aad6baeb5bf3fae79130816e4994af5c/merged
# podman mount f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
/var/lib/containers/storage/overlay/3dacf07b65cd12e926615d192c484c42aad6baeb5bf3fae79130816e4994af5c/merged
```
And Unmount it multiple times, Should fail on the third umount.
```
# podman umount f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
# podman umount f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
# podman umount f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c
error unmounting container f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c: error unmounting container f7a9d4911d2a4d72778de5ab5944ecdb9414963e0b22223b4b1653f1579a9d6c root filesystem: layer is not mounted
```
So it seems to be an issue only when container is running.
